hero.subtitle: Smart Coworking in the centre of Tarragona. Access at your pace, work with focus and peace of mind.

about.title1: A space to work your way
about.text1: Bart's Smart Coworking is a 50 m² workspace in the centre of Tarragona, designed for professionals looking for a quiet, well-equipped environment with flexible access. We work by prior booking only, to guarantee your spot and the quality of the space.
about.text1b: Access is via personal code and the space has 24h CCTV. Bart works in sales and is here every day, always accompanied by his dogs.
about.text2: A space where every detail is designed to keep work flowing. Fridge, sandwich maker, coffee machine and complimentary water at your disposal. Everything you need for a full working day.
about.text2b: We work with trust. We expect punctuality and honesty from those who use the space, just as we commit to taking care of every detail so your experience is always a good one.
about.text2c: The space is shared, please keep it clean and tidy after each use.
about.multilingual: Bart's Smart Coworking also speaks English, French and Dutch, feel free to reach out in your language.

card1.name: High Table Coworking
card1.desc: 4 high seats with views of the pedestrian street.

card3.name: Coworking Table
card3.desc: Table with 4 chairs, ideal for working individually or as a group.

pet.title: Dogs are welcome
pet.text: The owner's dogs are in the space every day. Bart's Smart Coworking was born pet friendly — not as a policy but as part of the atmosphere. Your dog is welcome, we just ask for mutual respect for the shared space.

testimonial.title: Information about the space
testimonial.item1: Prior booking required for all spaces
testimonial.item2: Personal code access, Open from 8:00 to 22:00
testimonial.item5: Your first coffee, on us. Coffee machine available throughout your stay.
testimonial.item8: Bart's dogs always here, Genuinely pet friendly
testimonial.item9: Shared space, Please keep it clean
testimonial.item10: Soundproof booth available for private calls and video calls

location.title: Where we are
location.transport: 5 min walk from the train station
location.center: Right in the centre of Tarragona

footer.tagline: Smart Coworking in the centre of Tarragona. A space to work your way.
